    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy
    A stateful circuit breaker implementation modeled after Spring Retry's CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy.
    CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy.State
    Circuit breaker state enumeration.
    ConfigurationPropertiesUtils
    A util class related to configuration properties class.
    FrameworkRetryAutoConfiguration
    Auto-configuration for Framework Retry circuit breaker.
    FrameworkRetryCircuitBreaker
    Circuit breaker implementation using Spring Framework 7's retry support.
    FrameworkRetryCircuitBreakerFactory
    Factory for creating FrameworkRetryCircuitBreaker instances.
    FrameworkRetryConfig
    Configuration for a Framework Retry circuit breaker.
    FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder
    Builder for FrameworkRetryConfig.
    ReactiveResilience4JAutoConfiguration
     
    ReactiveResilience4JAutoConfiguration.MicrometerReactiveResilience4JCustomizerConfiguration
     
    ReactiveResilience4JAutoConfiguration.Resilience4jBulkheadConfiguration
     
    ReactiveResilience4jBulkheadProvider
     
    ReactiveResilience4JCircuitBreaker
     
    ReactiveResilience4JCircuitBreakerFactory
     
    Resilence4JMetricsOrderingAutoConfiguration
    Auto-configuration to ensure that TimeLimiterMetricsAutoConfiguration goes after CompositeMeterRegistryAutoConfiguration so that the MeterRegistry bean is available.
    Resilience4JAutoConfiguration
     
    Resilience4JAutoConfiguration.MicrometerResilience4JCustomizerConfiguration
     
    Resilience4JAutoConfiguration.MicrometerResilience4JGroupCustomizerConfiguration
     
    Resilience4JAutoConfiguration.ObservationRegistryCustomizerResilience4jCustomizer
     
    Resilience4JAutoConfiguration.Resilience4jBulkheadConfiguration
     
    Resilience4jBulkheadConfigurationBuilder
     
    Resilience4jBulkheadConfigurationBuilder.BulkheadConfiguration
     
    Resilience4jBulkheadProvider
     
    Resilience4JCircuitBreaker
     
    Resilience4JCircuitBreakerFactory
     
    Resilience4JConfigBuilder
     
    Resilience4JConfigBuilder.Resilience4JCircuitBreakerConfiguration
     
    Resilience4JConfigurationProperties
     
    SpringRetryAutoConfiguration
     
    SpringRetryCircuitBreaker
    Deprecated.
    in favor of the CircuitBreaker implementation in spring-cloud-circuitbreaker-framework-retry
    SpringRetryCircuitBreakerFactory
    Deprecated.
    in favor of the CircuitBreakerFactory implementation in spring-cloud-circuitbreaker-framework-retry
    SpringRetryConfig
     
    SpringRetryConfigBuilder
    Allows consumers to easily construct a SpringRetryConfig object.
